Centimeters to Inches Converter

Convert centimeters to inches in seconds using the exact 1 inch = 2.54 centimeters definition, with clear steps and real world examples.

Precision based on the international inch standard (1 in = 2.54 cm).

0
Fractional: –
Visual ruler

Fractions map to common 1/16 inch marks; metric ticks show exact spacing.

Pro outputs

    How to convert centimeters to inches

    Centimeters and inches are both units of length. Centimeters belong to the metric system, while inches are part of the imperial and US customary systems. The relationship between them is fixed by international agreement.

    The exact definition is: 

    1 inch = 2.54 centimeters

    From this, you can derive the basic conversion formula from centimeters to inches: 

    inches = centimeters / 2.54

    To use this formula, take your length in centimeters and divide by 2.54. The result is the same length expressed in inches.

    Reverse formula: inches to centimeters

    If you ever need to go the other way, from inches back to centimeters, you can rearrange the same relationship: 

    centimeters = inches * 2.54

    Our centimeters to inches converter focuses on cm to in, but this reverse formula is useful when you want to check your results or convert measurements from imperial to metric.

    Real world example: converting height from cm to inches

    Imagine your height is 170 centimeters and you want to know how tall that is in inches for a form that uses imperial units.

    1. Start with the value in centimeters: 170 cm.
    2. Apply the formula inches = centimeters / 2.54.
    3. Compute 170 / 2.54 = 66.9291 inches.

    So a height of 170 cm is about 66.93 inches. If you prefer feet and inches, you can divide by 12: 

    feet = inches / 12

    66.93 inches is 5 full feet (5 * 12 = 60 inches) plus 6.93 inches, so you are about 5 feet 7 inches tall.

    Our online converter performs the centimeters to inches step instantly, helping you avoid manual division and rounding mistakes.

    Why use an online centimeters to inches converter?

    While the formula inches = centimeters / 2.54 is simple, doing the math by hand or on a basic calculator can be slow and error prone, especially when you work with many measurements.

    • Instant conversion for any value in centimeters.
    • Consistent use of the exact 2.54 factor for high precision.
    • No need to remember the formula or do repeated division.

    This is particularly helpful for students, engineers, designers, and anyone who frequently switches between metric and imperial units.

    Frequently asked questions about converting cm to inches

    How do you convert centimeters to inches?

    To convert centimeters to inches, divide the length value in centimeters by 2.54. One inch is defined as exactly 2.54 centimeters, so inches = centimeters / 2.54.

    How many inches is 10 cm?

    10 centimeters is equal to 10 / 2.54 inches, which is about 3.94 inches. In general, you can divide any centimeter value by 2.54 to get inches.

    Is 1 cm the same as 0.4 inches?

    1 centimeter is approximately 0.39 inches, not exactly 0.4 inches. The precise conversion is 1 cm = 1 / 2.54 inches, which is about 0.3937 inches.
